case_title: MILLER, JOSEPH et al VS JOHN ROBERT POWERS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN ROBERT POWERS
